falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 3% with a volume surge exceeding 200% of the 20-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout from consolidation would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal, indicating a confirmed uptrend

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day Average True Range (ATR) increases to 2.5x its current level within 7 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained volatility expansion would contradict the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing definitive trend acceleration

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX index drops below 18 for three consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp decline in volatility would falsify the 'HOLD' signal by indicating market complacency and potential trend continuation

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
